summary: Designed 13 locations spanning a northeast-to-southwest traverse across a failing empire, from the border garrison of Duskhaven (LOC-001) to the god-seal mechanism of the Quietus (LOC-013). Each location serves both the fantasy arc (escalating Pallor deterioration, conspiracy threads, ancient lore) and the romance arc (first meeting, forced proximity, vulnerability, intimacy, Black Moment, reconciliation, final choice). Includes: The Greymere salt marshes for early forced proximity; Calwrath ruins for Kaelith's defining wound; the Thornway military road for grudging partnership; Veldrane trade town as information nexus; the Wending forest for isolation and first Pallor tear encounter; Aranthem imperial capital for conspiracy and Black Moment; the Narrowing mountain pass for physical vulnerability; the Velenwash geothermal valley for intimacy; Serath Dûn ancient temple for reconciliation; Rivenmarch borderlands for the cage opening; the Unwalked Reach reality-frayed zone for trust made literal; and the Quietus for climactic resolution. Established a Pallor deterioration gradient (east=intact, west=torn, Reach=absent) that structures the journey's escalating tension. Defined travel rules with specific route distances, times, and modes including the kinetic memory navigation system for the Unwalked Reach. Reserved 5 unexplored regions for series expansion (INV-066). All names use canonical nameRegistry entries; no placeholder names from world-seed.txt appear.
